full_text:
Immunofluorescence for the organoids

Fixation and storage

Carefully remove the medium using a 25ul tip from the edge of the well. Wash the wells with 25ul PBS. Add 25ul per well 4% PFA, fix at RT for 1 hr.

Remove PFA, and wash the wells once with 25 ul PBS. Add 30 uL PBS per well and store in a moist chamber at +4 until staining.

Staining

Add 25 ul per well blocking buffer🡪 3%BSA + 2% TritonX-100 in 1xPBS incubate at RT for 1 hr.

Remove blocking buffer and add 25 ul / well antibody cocktail + 1:8000 diluted Hoechst prepared in blocking buffer. Incubate overnight at +4 in a moist chamber.

Next day, remove the antibody mixture, and wash the wells once with 25ul PBS.

To the first two wells (I), add 1:1000 diluted NuncSpot (25 ul in PBS). Incubate at RT for 5 min. Leave the remaining wells in PBS until next step.

Wash wells NuncSpot wells with 25ul of PBS. Mount the slide using Prolong gold mounting medium without DAPI.

Allow the slides to air dry in the dark overnight at room temperature (I normally keep it in the lab bench drawer).

Next day image the slides using OperaPhenix scanner

Antibody cocktails:

Prepare for 150ul

NuncSpot (470), dilution 1:1000 incubate for 5 min at RT on the next day

CK7- 555, dilution 1:200 🡪0.75ul

CD45-647, dilution 1:25🡪 6 ul

Hoechst 1:100 dil 🡪 1.9 ul

141.4 ul buffer

CD4-488, dilution 1:50 🡪 3ul

CD3D-555, dilution, 1:50🡪 3ul

CD8-647, dilution, 1:25🡪 6ul

Hoechst 1:100 dil 🡪 1.9 ul

136 ul buffer

CD163, 488, dilution 1:100🡪 1.5 ul

CD68, 555/PE, dilution 1:100🡪 1.5 ul

HLA-DBP1, 647, dilution 1:200🡪 0.75

Hoechst 1:100 dil 🡪 1.9 ul

144 ul buffer

Ki67, 488,dilution 1:100 🡪 1.5 ul

CD3, 555, dilution, 1:50🡪 1.5 ul

PAX8, 647, dilution, 1:25🡪 6 ul

Hoechst 1:100 dil 🡪 1.9 ul

139 ul buffer

Cyclin A, 488, dilution, 1:150🡪 1 ul

CK7, 594, dilution 1:200🡪 0.75 ul

gH2Ax, 647, dilution 1:100🡪 1.5 ul

Hoechst 1:100 dil 🡪 1.9 ul

145 ul buffer

NOTE: Prepare 1:100 Hoechst in 1xPBS and store it in +4-antibody box up to one month.
